headline: Morgan Stanley Names Citigroup Inc. (C) Its Top Pick, Raises Price Target
summary: Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C) ranks among the best spring stocks to buy right now. On February 17, Morgan Stanley boosted Citigroup Inc. (NYSE:C)’s price target to $152 from $135 and labeled the bank its top pick, retaining an Overweight rating on the company’s shares. According to the firm, Citigroup Inc. headline: Canada and India move to reset ties as trust in U.S. falters
summary: India and Canada's relations have thawed with the two sides promising to deepen trade, but it is far from a complete reset.
